title: Baroque Works Prepares the Next Move
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on baroque works prepares the next move, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Baroque Works Prepares the Next Move. Baroque Works’ senior agents are summoned while the Straw Hats and Vivi continue moving through the desert toward the heart of Alabasta’s crisis. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: We were supposed to get this delivered to the King at Alubanna...!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: We were only following the King's orders...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Orders to deliver this thing, whatever it is! That's all we know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You know what that is, Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's commonly known by its nickname,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: It was invented in some country where rain was very rare.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you send it up to the atmosphere as a mist of powder,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What it does is stimulate the formation of ice particles in clouds at sub-freezing temperatures to later have it released as rain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: In short, it's a powder that artificially makes rain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ohhh, I get it. So it's a "magic powder," eh?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: So you're saying it makes rain fall.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Hm? Wait, if that's the case, isn't that exactly what your country needs right now?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: That's what anyone would think at first.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: The people first danced with joy when it was invented in their country...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: But behind the blessing it calls forth lies a great pitfall...

summary: This part develops baroque works prepares the next move and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
